name: Neighborhood Housing Services Of South Florida- Broward County
description_short: HUD-certified non-profit offering free homebuyer education, financial counseling, and first-time homebuyer loans across South Florida's Miami-Dade and Broward counties.
description_long:
Neighborhood Housing Services of South Florida (NHSSF) is a non-profit organization serving the Miami-Dade and Broward County communities with housing-related financial assistance and education. The organization has established itself as a comprehensive resource for individuals seeking to navigate the homeownership journey, from initial education through post-purchase support. With offices in Miami-Dade (walk-in available) and Broward (by appointment), NHSSF serves a diverse, multilingual population across South Florida.

NHSSF provides a wide range of free and low-cost services centered on homeownership and financial stability. Their primary offerings include HUD-certified homebuyer education workshops (8-hour courses available in English and Spanish), one-on-one financial counseling sessions, housing stability counseling for those facing eviction or foreclosure, online homebuyer education through their EHome America partnership, and first-time homebuyer lending products. The organization also operates community programs including weatherization assistance and a beautification initiative. Over the last three years, they've created 248 first-time homeowners, provided 35 first-time homebuyer loans, and conducted over 4,000 one-on-1 counseling sessions.

NHSSF distinguishes itself through its integration of education, counseling, and lending services under one organization, allowing clients to progress from foundational financial literacy through actual loan products. The organization offers flexible learning through EHome America's self-paced online platform alongside traditional in-person workshops. Their bilingual capacity (Spanish and English) and specific focus on underserved communities in South Florida reflect a commitment to accessibility. Client testimonials highlight professional staff expertise and comprehensive support throughout the homebuying process, with particular praise for their lending services and post-purchase follow-up (including solar panel programs).

However, NHSSF is geographically limited to South Florida (Miami-Dade and Broward counties only) and cannot serve clients elsewhere. The Broward office operates by appointment only with no walk-in hours, which may create access barriers for some clients. While they offer first-time homebuyer loans, their lending capacity appears limited relative to their counseling services (only 35 loans over three years), suggesting this may not be their primary function. As a non-profit, service availability may depend on funding and program capacity.
pros: HUD-certified homebuyer education and counseling from a non-profit, eliminating profit-driven bias
Dual offices in Miami-Dade (walk-in hours 8:30 AM-5 PM Mon-Fri) and Broward with multilingual support
Integrated services pathway: education → counseling → lending, allowing progression without switching providers
EHome America partnership provides HUD-certified online classes with self-paced, flexible scheduling
Created 248 first-time homeowners in last 3 years with strong client testimonials on staff expertise
Emergency counseling for eviction and foreclosure situations (HSCP Program) available
Post-purchase support including weatherization assistance and solar panel programs
cons: Geographic limitation to Miami-Dade and Broward counties only — cannot serve South Florida residents outside these areas
Broward office operates by appointment only with no walk-in hours, reducing accessibility compared to Miami-Dade location
Limited lending capacity (only 35 first-time homebuyer loans over 3 years) suggests lending may be secondary to counseling services
First-time homebuyer loan approval criteria, terms, and rates not disclosed on website
No 24/7 access; standard business hours only with maximum walk-in availability at Miami-Dade office until 1 PM for document drop-off
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Miami-Dade or Broward County seeking free education and professional guidance
Renters facing eviction or homeowners facing foreclosure needing emergency counseling and stability assistance
Spanish-speaking individuals seeking bilingual homebuyer education and financial counseling
Low-to-moderate income households seeking affordable first-time homebuyer loans with supportive lending practices
diagnosis: NHSSF is best for first-time homebuyers and financially vulnerable renters in Miami-Dade or Broward County seeking free, non-profit education and counseling. The main caveat is geographic limitation: this organization cannot serve South Florida residents outside these two counties, and appointment-only Broward access may create scheduling barriers.
services: HUD-certified 8-hour homebuyer education workshops (English and Spanish, in-person and online)
One-on-one financial counseling and homebuying guidance sessions
Housing Stability Counseling Program (HSCP) for eviction and foreclosure prevention
EHome America self-paced online homebuyer education
Post-purchase counseling and financial literacy support
Account creation and online client portal access
Solar panel program referrals for eligible homeowners
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 2880 W Oakland Park Blvd, Suite 115, Oakland Park, FL 33311
